name: Credex AutoTitle Loans Orlando
description_short: Credex provides auto title loans in Orlando ranging from $750–$5,000 with same-day approval and no credit checks. Borrowers retain vehicle use while using their car title as collateral.
description_long: Credex AutoTitle Loans Orlando is an auto equity lender operating in Central Florida under the Florida Consumer Finance Act. The company specializes in fast, short-term secured loans for consumers who have been rejected by traditional lenders due to poor credit or lack of credit history. Their business model centers on vehicle title-based lending, where borrowers pledge their car's title as collateral to receive cash within one business day. Credex claims to serve Miami-Dade, Broward, West Palm Beach counties, and nearby Orlando areas including zip codes 32806–32825. The company operates a physical location at 1300 S Semoran Blvd, Orlando, FL 32807, with business hours Monday–Friday 9am–6pm and Saturday 9am–2pm. Credex explicitly warns consumers that legitimate representatives never request payment before loan approval and contract signing, positioning themselves against advance-fee scams. Credex offers auto title loans (marketed as such but structured as auto equity loans under Florida Statute 516) with loan amounts from $750 to $5,000. The application process is streamlined: submit proof of residence and income plus national ID, Credex appraises vehicle equity, and borrowers receive a check. Repayment terms range from 6 to 24 months. The company reports a 98% approval rate and emphasizes that borrowers keep both their cash and vehicle during the loan period. APRs range from 18–30% according to their main copy, though specific loan examples show rates as high as 34.57%, and they disclose a maximum APR of 35.95%. A one-time $25 application fee applies. Credex distinguishes itself through accessibility features (Epilepsy Safe Mode, Visually Impaired Mode, Cognitive Disability Mode) and transparent loan cost examples on their website. They position themselves as serving underbanked or poor-credit consumers whom traditional institutions reject. The company emphasizes fair lending practices and compliance with Florida Consumer Finance Act regulations. However, the high APRs (up to 35.95%) place these loans in the subprime category typical of secured emergency lending. The loan amounts ($750–$5,000) and repayment terms (6–24 months) indicate this is not a payday loan alternative but rather a longer-term secured credit product. While faster and more accessible than traditional lending, the cost of borrowing remains substantial, and vehicle seizure risk exists if payments are missed, as the title serves as collateral.
pros: No credit score checks required; approval based on vehicle value and repayment ability
Same-day or next-day funding; streamlined three-step application process
Borrowers keep their vehicle during the loan period despite using title as collateral
Flexible repayment terms from 6 to 24 months to match borrower cash flow
Loan amounts up to $5,000 available, larger than typical payday loans
Physical location in Orlando with extended hours (weekday 9am–6pm, Saturday 9am–2pm)
Transparent fee structure and loan cost examples provided on website
Scam warning prominent on website to protect consumers from advance-fee fraud
cons: Maximum APR of 35.95% is very high; typical disclosed range of 18–30% does not reflect actual rates in loan examples
Vehicle title held as collateral; failure to repay results in car seizure and loss of transportation
Limited service area; primarily serves Miami-Dade, Broward, West Palm Beach counties despite Orlando branding
One-time $25 application fee applies in addition to APR charges
Insurance requirements may be mandatory to qualify, increasing total borrowing cost
Loan amounts capped at $5,000, insufficient for major expenses or debt consolidation
best_for: Consumers with poor credit who need fast cash ($750–$5,000) and own a vehicle outright
Borrowers facing emergency expenses who cannot qualify for unsecured personal loans or credit lines
Individuals who need funds within 1–2 business days and can afford monthly payments of $150–$250+
People seeking alternatives to payday loans who have a longer repayment timeline (6–24 months)
diagnosis: Credex AutoTitle Loans Orlando is best for consumers with poor credit facing genuine emergency cash needs ($750–$5,000) who own a vehicle and can afford higher monthly payments over 6–24 months. The primary caveat is the high cost of borrowing (APRs up to 35.95%) and vehicle seizure risk if repayment fails; this is suitable only when traditional loans are unavailable and the borrower has genuine ability to repay within the agreed term.
services: Auto title loan origination and underwriting
Loan amount calculation with lien holder fees and document stamp tax included
Flexible repayment plans from 6 to 24 months
Monthly payment options structured to match borrower ability to repay
Free quotation form and online application submission
Phone-based customer service (855-527-3339) and email support (service@credex.net)
In-person loan processing at 1300 S Semoran Blvd, Orlando location
FAQ and educational resources on auto equity loans
Compliance documentation under Florida Consumer Finance Act (Florida Statute 516)
Website accessibility modes for users with epilepsy, visual impairment, and cognitive disabilities
